about.title: About ChaseTech Power
about.description: HK ChaseTech Power Trading Limited is a professional enterprise established in Hong Kong, specializing in international trade, import and export of electronic products and related businesses. We are committed to providing global customers with high-quality electronic components, raw materials, professional manufacturing services, brand agency and technical consulting.

about.title: About Us
about.subtitle: Rooted in International Trade, Connecting Global Technology
about.description: HK ChaseTech Power Trading Limited is a professional enterprise established in Hong Kong SAR, specializing in international trade, import and export of electronic products and related businesses.

highlights.title: Global Vision
highlights.description: Based in Hong Kong, serving worldwide. Years of deep expertise in international electronics trade with rich industry resources and supply chain advantages.

highlights.title: Quality Assurance
highlights.description: Strictly selecting suppliers and partners to ensure all products and services meet international quality standards and customer requirements.

highlights.title: Flexible Customization
highlights.description: Flexible manufacturing services from prototype small orders to mass production, supporting OEM/ODM cooperation models.

highlights.title: Professional Service
highlights.description: Equipped with professional teams providing full-cycle service from product selection, technical consultation to after-sales support.

categories.title: Hysic Custom Power Supply
categories.description: Shenzhen HYSIC Semiconductor Energy Technology Co., Ltd. is a power electronics platform under Dean Group, focusing on high-power energy conversion technology to provide reliable and efficient power and energy storage solutions globally.

products.name: AI Server Rack-Mount Power Supply
products.定位: Data centers, AI computing clusters, supercomputing rooms — 7×24h core power equipment
products.advantage: Ultra-high power density, 80PLUS Titanium efficiency (96%), wide voltage input, strong EMI protection
products.spec: 3200W / 1U Rack / M-CRPS Standard / N+1/N+N Redundant Hot-Swap
products.application: Data center servers, AI computing hosts, network switches, edge computing devices

products.name: PV & Energy Storage Bi-directional Inverter
products.定位: Commercial & industrial PV, large energy storage power plants, grid-side converter systems
products.advantage: Ultra-high conversion efficiency, intelligent bidirectional dispatch, modular flexible expansion, wide temperature range
products.application: Light storage microgrid, backup power, construction sites, oilfield exploitation

products.name: Programmable DC Power Supply
products.定位: R&D laboratories, production line reliability testing, new energy component testing
products.advantage: Wide-range auto-ranging, CV/CC/CP three-mode adaptive, high-precision programmable control
products.application: ATE automated testing, laboratory R&D, semiconductor and power electronics testing

categories.title: Astech Adhesive Tape
categories.description: Astech quick-release mesh foam adhesive tape, made with PET substrate through special foaming process, featuring excellent adhesion, cushioning and air-venting performance. Suitable for electronic screen bonding and cushioning protection.
categories.application: Electronic screen bonding and cushioning protection
